skills.name: JSON to Studio
skills.description: Parses, validates, normalizes, and indexes design-system JSON into studio-ready records.

skills.name: Design Lock Audit
skills.description: Checks the WHISPERX visual identity against locked typography, red signal, dark/light, spatial hierarchy, and motion constraints.

skills.name: Install Planner
skills.description: Builds a dependency-aware install plan with duplicate/conflict checks and rollback notes before writing user files.

library.title: Studio Shell
library.summary: Editorial workspace that connects import, library, preview, export, and install surfaces without replacing the approved landing page.

library.title: Marketing Library
library.summary: Indexes current landing surfaces and classifies approved WHISPERX identity content for reuse.

library.title: Gallery Library
library.summary: Registers available public imagery and preview states while marking external asset ingestion as partial.
